# Loadly - Global Logistics Matchmaking Platform

> Loadly is a premium logistics matchmaking platform connecting shippers with carriers globally. Shippers post freight ads, carriers submit competitive bids, and our system facilitates direct communication upon bid acceptance.

## Site Index & Entry Points

- **Primary URL**: https://loadlyapp.com
- **Sitemap Index**: https://loadlyapp.com/sitemap.xml
- **Marketplace Posting Directory**: https://loadlyapp.com/en/marketplace
- **Logistics Blog & Resources**: https://loadlyapp.com/en/blog
- **Login Portal**: https://loadlyapp.com/en/login
- **Registration**: https://loadlyapp.com/en/register

## User Personas & Roles

- **Shippers (Load Owners)**: Individual freight owners, logistics companies, or manufacturers with cargo to move.
- **Carriers (Drivers/Transporters)**: Owners of cargo vans, semi-trucks, reefers, flatbeds, or tankers seeking active shipping assignments.

## Platform Capabilities

- **Multilingual Support**: Serves users in 16 languages (`en`, `tr`, `es`, `pt`, `fr`, `de`, `it`, `pl`, `nl`, `ru`, `uk`, `zh`, `ja`, `hi`, `ar`, `fa`) with localized descriptions, titles, and layouts.
- **Freight Bidding & Matching**: Shippers receive real-time driver offers with pricing bids and carrier notes.
- **Secure Messaging & Verification**: Accepting a bid unlocks real-time chat. Phone numbers are protected and only shared once both parties explicitly consent.
- **Gamification & Points**: Driver engagement is gated and rewarded through a points system (e.g., bidding costs 10 points; first-message bonuses reward active carriers).
- **Ratings & Reviews**: Both parties rate each other upon shipment completion to ensure platform safety and quality control.

## Supported Cargo Types
- General Cargo
- Hazardous Material
- Perishable (Reefer Required)
- Oversized / Heavy Haul
- Fragile Shipments

## Supported Fleet/Truck Types
- TIR / Semi-truck
- Truck / Rigid Truck
- Van / Light Truck
- Flatbed / Trailer
- Tanker
- Reefer / Refrigerated Trailer

## Data Structures & Crawling Guidelines
All active listings are rendered on the client with structured JSON-LD `Service` and `BreadcrumbList` schemas. The primary index at `/en/marketplace` exposes a structured `ItemList` schema. Sitemaps are dynamically generated to surface thousands of localized pages across all 16 languages for instant search extraction and GEO/AEO/SEO ranking.
